snapshot.title: Renew your SIA licence GOV.UK
snapshot.meta_description: Find out what you need to do to renew your SIA licence.
snapshot.summary: Find out what you need to do to renew your SIA licence.
headline_items: Guidance Renew your SIA licence Find out what you need to do to renew your SIA licence.
You must apply for a renewal if you want to keep working in the same role when your current licence expires.
You are not guaranteed a licence just because you already have one.
If your licence has already expired, you must apply for a new licence .
On 1 December 2025 we updated the rules we use when making our licensing decisions.
Learn more about what we changed .

snapshot.title: Apply for an SIA licence GOV.UK
snapshot.meta_description: What to do before you apply, and how to apply for a licence yourself or through your employer.
snapshot.summary: What to do before you apply, and how to apply for a licence yourself or through your employer.
headline_items: Guidance Apply for an SIA licence What to do before you apply, and how to apply for a licence yourself or through your employer.
To be successful, you will need to pass all of our application checks.
But you can help your application by taking care to provide correct and complete information whenever we ask for it.
On 1 December 2025 we updated the rules we use when making our licensing decisions.
Learn more about what changed .
Get ready for our application checks When we get your application for an SIA licence, we will run checks on your information.

source.name: Check what training you need to get an SIA licence

snapshot.title: Check what training you need to get an SIA licence GOV.UK
snapshot.meta_description: Information about licence-linked qualifications, the awarding organisations that offer these qualifications, and how to find an approved training provider.
snapshot.summary: Information about licence-linked qualifications, the awarding organisations that offer these qualifications, and how to find an approved training provider.
headline_items: Guidance Check what training you need to get an SIA licence Information about licence-linked qualifications, the awarding organisations that offer these qualifications, and how to find an approved training provider.
This is so we can be sure you have the skills and knowledge you need to hold a licence and do your job safely.
You do not need a licence-linked qualification to get a non-front line licence or a key holding licence .
Once you have successfully got the qualification you need for a front line licence, the awarding organisation will tell us.
We must get this notification before you can submit your licence application.
Otherwise, you will not be able to submit the application.

source.name: Changes to the training you need for an SIA licence

snapshot.title: Changes to the training you need for an SIA licence GOV.UK
snapshot.meta_description: What the changes are, when they will happen, and how they affect SIA licence applicants and licence holders.
snapshot.summary: What the changes are, when they will happen, and how they affect SIA licence applicants and licence holders.
headline_items: News story Changes to the training you need for an SIA licence What the changes are, when they will happen, and how they affect SIA licence applicants and licence holders.

From: Security Industry Authority Published 5 February 2021 Last updated 1 April 2026 — See all updates Changes for close protection operatives These changes apply to you if you hold, or are applying for, a close protection licence.
Changes we introduced on 1 April 2026 On 1 April 2025 we made it a requirement that you must have a ‘refresher’ qualification before you can renew your close protection licence.
You must hold a level 3 first aid qualification (FAW or equivalent) before you can take the refresher training ( read about the first aid qualifications we accept ).
You will need to show this to your training provider when you register for the course.
Changes we introduced in 2022 In 2022 we introduced an updated close protection qualification.

source.name: Check security staff have a licence to work

snapshot.title: Check security staff have a licence to work GOV.UK
snapshot.meta_description: Check SIA licences for security staff such as door supervisors, security guards, CCTV operators and close protection operatives.
snapshot.summary: Check SIA licences for security staff such as door supervisors, security guards, CCTV operators and close protection operatives.
headline_items: Check security staff have a licence to work You must check if someone has the correct security licence before hiring them for private security work.
If they do not, you must make sure they get training and a licence .
Explore the topic Recruiting and hiring

source.name: SIA announces new refresher training for close protection operatives

snapshot.title: SIA announces new refresher training for close protection operatives GOV.UK
snapshot.meta_description: From Wednesday 1 April 2026, close protection operatives must undertake refresher training to renew their licence.
snapshot.summary: From Wednesday 1 April 2026, close protection operatives must undertake refresher training to renew their licence.
headline_items: Press release SIA announces new refresher training for close protection operatives From Wednesday 1 April 2026, close protection operatives must undertake refresher training to renew their licence.
From: Security Industry Authority Published 27 August 2025 The new refresher qualification will be available from 1 October 2025.
The qualification updates the safety-critical skills that close protection operatives use to keep the public safe.
The SIA is encouraging licence holders who plan to renew their licence to take the training as soon as possible.
The SIA introduced new licence-linked qualifications for close protection in April 2022.
The regulator introduced accredited ‘top-up’ awards for close protection operatives in October 2022 as a requirement for renewing licences.
